---
title: "IBM 6540 Group Project"
subtitle: "Group 1"
author: "Tim Arana"
institute: "Cal Poly Pomona — MSDM"
date: today
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: simple
    slide-number: true
    transition: slide
    embed-resources: true
    footer: "IBM 6540 — Group 1 | Summer 2026"
---

## About This File

-   **Name:** Tim Arana
-   **Group:** 1
-   **Course:** IBM 6540 — Applied Machine Learning for Marketing
-   **Purpose:** Individual member file for the group project repository

## Group GitHub Repository

The group project repository, including the data file and group presentation, is available here:

**Page link:** <https://mjshawell.github.io/IBM-6540-Group-Project/Evans%2CJake-Group1.html>

**Page link:** To be added after publishing

## Thank You

Rendered with Quarto RevealJS

Tim Arana — Group 1
